response.justification: Despite extensive experience across languages and domains, the candidate lacks demonstrable professional experience in C++ or Rust for geospatial routing pipelines, and shows no evidence of working with routing tiles, navigation data systems, or distributed systems for map data freshness and consistency — core requirements for the role.
strengths: Extensive open-source GIS experience via GISCollective
Proven ability to work across diverse tech stacks and languages
Strong background in testing, CI/CD, and developer tooling
concerns: No commercial C++ or Rust experience in routing or geospatial pipelines
No evidence of distributed systems, fault tolerance, or real-time map update systems
Primary technical focus is JavaScript/TypeScript/Dlang, not the required C++ stack
